name: Fishjong 2
short_description: Fishjong is back with more colorful mahjong levels! Now play Fishjong 2! The goal is simple – clear the board by making matches. Various colors and shapes of tiles, new set and background. No storyline - just a great mahjong gameplay. Have fun playing ocean-theme levels.
detailed_description:
Fishjong is back with more colorful mahjong levels! Now play Fishjong 2! The goal is simple – clear the board by making matches. Various colors and shapes of tiles, new set and background. No storyline - just a great mahjong gameplay. Have fun playing ocean-theme levels.

Features:

- 108 levels to match free tiles
- More customizable content
- Relaxing gameplay and music
- Earn stars
about_the_game:
Fishjong is back with more colorful mahjong levels! Now play Fishjong 2! The goal is simple – clear the board by making matches. Various colors and shapes of tiles, new set and background. No storyline - just a great mahjong gameplay. Have fun playing ocean-theme levels.

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Dutch, Portuguese - Brazil
*languages with full audio support
